title: Croatian Pungent Sundried Cheese Bake
description: A hearty, savory dish combining the flavors of Croatia with the bold taste of pungent ingredients.
instructions: Slice the sundried croats bread into 1-inch thick slices.
In a bowl, mix the pungent cheese with the bake mix until well combined.
Drizzle the olive oil over the bread slices.
Top each bread slice with the cheese mixture.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the bread is toasted.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve warm.
Enjoy with a side salad or roasted vegetables.
